methodology: Three independent cold Python subprocess imports. V7 baseline imports tabs.home_split.legacy.implementation, the legacy module chain reached by Morning when loaded. V8 imports tabs.doo_prime.morning_control_v8_20260622, the dedicated read-only Morning renderer.
limitations: Cold-import benchmark only; not a live broker/network or full user-session benchmark.
Absolute RSS includes Python, pandas, Streamlit and dependency startup overhead.
V8 Analysis can still import the protected legacy Doo workspace when its expander is deliberately opened.
